text:
Dates are from October 8, 2018–April 3, 2023 

For each navigation-eligible beneficiary who was eligible for navigation and who opted in for and 
received navigation (i.e., non-missing NC_NVGTN_CASE_ID), this field indicates the date the navigation 
case terminated. Toward the end of the model, CMS advised bridge organizations to try to provide at 
least 3 months of navigation to those who opted in for navigation services. The termination dates for
